'''tadhaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smallgoods|smallgoods]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smallgoods|smallgoods]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tadhaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædhæjæth|tædhæjæth]] || [[word:tædhæjæj|tædhæjæj]] || [[word:tædhæjæsh|tædhæjæsh]] || [[word:tædhæjæ|tædhæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadhadhajath|tadhadhajath]] || [[word:tadhadhajaj|tadhadhajaj]] || [[word:tadhadhajash|tadhadhajash]] || [[word:tadhadhaja|tadhadhaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadhajath|tadhajath]] || [[word:tadhajaj|tadhajaj]] || [[word:tadhajash|tadhajash]] || [[word:tadhaja|tadhaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadhafjath|tadhafjath]] || [[word:tadhafjaj|tadhafjaj]] || [[word:tadhafjash|tadhafjash]] || [[word:tadhafjaf|tadhafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadhajatha|tadhajatha]] || [[word:tadhajaja|tadhajaja]] || [[word:tadhajasha|tadhajasha]] || [[word:tadhajaka|tadhajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadhajath|tadhajath]] || [[word:tadhajaj|tadhajaj]] || [[word:tadhajash|tadhajash]] || [[word:tadhaja|tadhaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadhajathal|tadhajathal]] || [[word:tadhajajal|tadhajajal]] || [[word:tadhajashal|tadhajashal]] || [[word:tadhajakal|tadhajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadhajathatha|tadhajathatha]] || [[word:tadhajajaja|tadhajajaja]] || [[word:tadhajashasha|tadhajashasha]] || [[word:tadhajaka|tadhajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadhajathan|tadhajathan]] || [[word:tadhajajan|tadhajajan]] || [[word:tadhajashan|tadhajashan]] || [[word:tadhajakan|tadhajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadhajathaoro|tadhajathaoro]] || [[word:tadhajajaoro|tadhajajaoro]] || [[word:tadhajashaoro|tadhajashaoro]] || [[word:tadhajakaoro|tadhajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
